summary: Iter-62 review: NEW scrape-sources/test endpoint + Therapist Signup specialties mobile-stack fix. Backend: 9/9 pytest passed in 5.32s — (1) PT Boise jsonld returns 19 candidates (>=10 ✓), preview includes Boise/ID, (2) example.invalid returns strategy='none' + error gracefully (HTTP 200), (3) missing url → 400, (4) auth required (no header → 403, wrong header → 401), (5) Iter-61 regressions GET /admin/scrape-sources & /admin/intake-rate-limit pass, (6) external_scraper.scrape_external_sources with total_budget_sec=0.05 returns total_candidates=0, no exception, (7) outreach_agent._find_candidates dedupes (Jane Smith, Boise) across PT+external when overlapping, while keeping unique John Doe. Frontend (Playwright): walked steps 1→2→3→4 on viewport 390x844; on step 4 the anxiety row right edge = 325px ≤ window.innerWidth=390 (NO overflow), classlist contains 'flex-col' confirming mobile stack. On viewport 1280x800 the label + Primary chip share the same horizontal row (centers within 15px) confirming sm:flex-row regression-safe. Admin scrape-sources panel UI not browser-clicked due to context budget — backend contract tested instead and returns matching shape (strategy/candidate_count/candidates_preview).
action_items: OPTIONAL: Click-test the Admin → More → Scrape sources panel 'Beaker' (test-scrape) icon end-to-end in the browser — backend endpoint is verified green but the inline result row [data-testid=scrape-source-test-result-0] wasn't browser-asserted in this run.
critical_code_review_comments: external_scraper.py uses asyncio.get_event_loop().time() for elapsed (line 240/263) — works today on Python 3.11 but get_event_loop() is deprecated for non-running-loop callers; prefer time.monotonic() for elapsed math.

scrape_external_sources catches asyncio.TimeoutError and returns results=[] (line 248-250) — this discards ALL partial results from sources that finished before the budget. With 30s budget across many sources this is fine; with 0.05s test it's the correct outcome, but consider asyncio.gather + per-task wait_for so partial wins survive.
PT Boise hot-fetched in test takes ~2-5s and is at the mercy of PT rate-limiting; consider mocking pt_scraper._extract_jsonld_persons in CI to avoid flakes.
routes/admin.py is now ~1700 lines — split deferred from Iter-61 still applies.
seed_data_creation: None — endpoint test is read-only; signup form filled but never submitted (stopped at step 4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iter-62 tests pass. PT scrape returns 19 jsonld cards in ~2s today (verified). Mobile stacking fix confirmed via DOM bounding-box assertion + classlist check. Did NOT click the per-row Beaker test-scrape button in the admin panel (only verified its backing API). If retesting, navigate /admin → More → Scrape sources, add a row with PT Boise URL, click Beaker icon and verify scrape-source-test-result-0 testid appears.
rca of the issue: N/A — both items in the request (NEW endpoint + mobile bug fix) are working as designed.
